titleStmt.title: SII 9.126: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 126. (A.R. No. 286 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE TAVAKESVARASVAMI TEMPLE AT UCHCHANGIDURGA, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 986, Krōdhi, Chaitra, paurṇamāsī, Ādityavāra corresponding to A.D. 1064 April 4, Sunday. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Āhavamalladēva and mentions his son Vēṅgimaṇḍalēśvara Vishṇuvardhana-Mahārāja Vijayādityadēva as ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand. It records that, at the request of the Daṇḍanāyaka Mūkarāja, Bijjaḷadva made a grant of land for the service of the god Gaḷagēśvara, after washing the feet of Kaḷēsvara-Paṇḍita. Another record engraved in continuation of this gives a legendary history of the Uchchaṅgi hill and the origin of the god Kalidēva to the east of it and states that while Dēvapayya was ruling over Uchchaṅgi thirty, he built the adhishṭhāna of the temple and a well and the Daṇḍanāyakas Nāgadēvayya, Eṟakapayya, Māramayya and the Sandhivigrahin Kāḷidāsa-Bhaṭṭa made, with the consent of the king, the grant of Rāvighaṭṭa for the service of the god Kalidēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmaccaḷukyavaṁśaśikhāmaṇi caturarṇnavāvṛtōrvvījanaciṁtāmaṇi dhātrīśvaracūḍāmaṇi vijayakkenallanāhavamalla .
vṛtta . Avanīmaṇḍaḷamaṁ niraṁtaritamāhēmādriyaṁ dakṣiṇābdhivaraṁ dōrvvaḷadarppadiṁ paduḷamāpūrvvābdhiyaṁ paścimābdhivaraṁ
pāḷisidaṁ madōddhatavirōdhikṣōṇibhrinmallanāhavamallaṁ vijayakkenallanadaṭaṁ śrīrāyanārāyaṇaṁ . svasti samastabhu
vanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁcā
ḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ salutta
mire tatsūnu svasti sarvvalōkāśraya samastabudhajanāśrayanāhavamallanaṁkagāṟaṁ paramaṁḍaḷasūṟekāṟaṁ kaṭa
kaprākāraṁ vaṁdijanādhāraṁ vīramadamarddana pratāpajanārddananacaḷitavākyaṁ cāḷukyamāḷikya vijayaśrīkēḷīsadanaṁ
navamadanaṁ vipakṣakuḷakāḷadaṇḍa vīramārtaṇḍa ripurāyakomārahṛdayasellaṁ sāhasamallaṁ dīnānāthaciṁtāma
ṇi maṇḍaḷikamakuṭacūḍāmaṇi veṁgimaṇḍaḷēśvaranayyanadēvaṁ śrīviṣṇuvarddhanamahārājavijayādityadēvarnnoḷaṁbavā
ḍi mūvattircchāsiramaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadināḷdu rājyaṁgeyyuttire . vṛtta . parahitadiṁde saṁda vibudhaṁ maneverggaḍe daṇḍa
ma ṇi mūkarāja vibhu binnavisalpiridaṟtiyiṁdavā surucirakīrti dānanidhi bijjaladēvananūnadhārmmikaṁ
ṇayanittaneyda gaḷagēśvaradēvarigēṁ kṛtārtthanō . sakavarṣa 986 neya krōdhisaṁvatsarada caitrada paurṇnamā
sayādityavāraṁ vanadaparvvanimittaṁ gaḷagēśvaradēvarge yuccaṁgiyakōṭeyalu teṁka baṇḍasigeṟeyumaṁ
dēvara munte pannirmmattarbbeḻdaleyumaṁ ba vattōṁṭamumaṁ pūrvvadalu naḍeyuttaṁ bandīśānyada cōḷagāvuṇḍana
kaṭṭamumaṁ kaḷēśvarapaṇḍitara kālaṁ kaṟci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ sarvvanamaśyaṁ māḍi gaḷḷagēśvaradēvarge biṭṭarī bhūmi dēvarigoṁ
dubhāgaṁ maṭakkeraḍubhāgavī dharmmavaṁ pratipāḷisidava(ra)rarggyatīrthaṁ prayāge kurukṣētra vāraṇāsiyeṁbī puṇyakṣē
tradoḷpannirsāsirakavileyaṁ pannircchāsirvvarvvēdapāragarappa bāhmaṇarggedānaṁgeyda phaḷamidanaḷidā
tanā kṣētradoḷā kaviḷeyuvanā brāhmaṇarumanaḷida pātakanakku Idu kāḷāmukhasthānaṁ nakaraṁ rakṣisuvar .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharā . ṣaṣṭhivarpasahasrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .

kadaṁbāvāḍināḍa madhyadoḷmēruvippaṁtiḻduduccaṁgiya parvvataṁ Adakke nālku nāmevadeṁ
teṁdoḍe kṛtayugadoḷu mēghanādaneṁba rākṣasanivāsamappudaṟiṁ mēghanā
daveṁbudu trēteyoḷ hiraṇyakanivāsamātana nārāyaṇaṁ vadhegeydaṁdinosa
geyoḷ svarṇnavriṣṭa kaṟedudaṟiṁ vīrakanakagiriyeṁbudu dvāpāradoḷuttuṁgama
hariṣi Āśramamappudaṟiṁ Uttuṁgaparvvatameṁbudu kaliyugadoḷ Uccaṁgiya
bbeyeṁbaḷu modalāgi mūvaru brāhmaṇakannikeyaru tapaṁgeydīśvaravara
prasādadiṁ dēvatvamaṁ paḍedaradaṟiṁduccaṁgiyāparvvatameṁbudu Ā pa
rvvatada mūḍaṇadeseyoḷu hiḍiṁbavanamā banadoḷage svayaṁbhukalidē
vasvāmiyeṁbudu Ā dēvargge dēgulavammāḍisidaḷu hiḍiṁbe ditta
hiḍiṁbēsvarameṁbudu Ā liṁgaṁ percce perccuva kāraṇadiṁ kaḷēśvaramadamṛtaliṁgadēvar
prasannatayiṁ kaṇḍu śrīmaddaṇḍanāyaka dēvapayya Uccaṁgi mūvattumanāḷutta(manāḷutta)mi
ḻdu dēgulada Adhiṣṭhānamaṁ kaṭṭisi maṭha maggalu bāviyeṁbivaṁ māḍisi pradhānarggaṟipida
dēvargge bhōgamappaṁtāgi Arasargge binnahaṁgeyvudeṁdoḍe śrīmanmaneverggaḍe daṇḍanāyaka nāgadē
vayyanuṁ daṇḍanāyaka Eṟakapayyanu śrīmatsandhivigrahi daṇḍanāyaka māramayyanu
sandhivigrahi kāḷidāsabhaṭṭaru Arasargge binnapaṁgeydaru rāvighaṭṭavaṁ biḍuvadeṁdoḍa
rasaru Īccaṟadar . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallava mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara
paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvaru vija
yarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarttamānamācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tadanuja
svasti samastabhuvanastutemahāmahimōllasitapallavānvayaStops here abruptly.
Digital edition of SII 9.126 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
